title: neotinea conica
intro: Neotinea conica, also known as the Burnt Orchid, is a species of orchid found in various parts of Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including soothing skin irritations and reducing inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Neotinea conica can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, which are often used in folk remedies to address various health issues.
